title: Fallout Mash-up Pack
description: Explore a post-apocalyptic wasteland with the Fallout Mash-up Pack! A port from Legacy Console Edition.
body:
# Welcome to the wasteland, traveler!
This is a port of the Fallout (Vault-Tec) Mash-up Pack made with [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) in mind.

**This Pack requires the following mods for the best experience**

[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)

[Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins)



**Known Issues**
- Missing Hardcore Textures
- Some textures are a little innacurate
- Playing without Legacy4J causes many menus to break

If you find any other problems, please let me know on Discord (redrain0o0)
